headline: Ford’s Employee Pricing Push Tests Volume Growth Against Margin Pressure
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) has launched its "American Value. For American Values." campaign. For a limited time, Ford is extending employee pricing on most new 2025 and 2026 vehicles to all US customers. The campaign is framed as a celebration of America's 250th anniversary and a response to vehicle affordability concerns. Ford Motor, trading at $11.88 under ticker NYSE:F, is rolling out this wide access pricing move at a time when affordability is front of mind for many car buyers. The share...

headline: F Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Expansion and Software Drive Results Amid Volume Decline
summary: Automotive manufacturer Ford (NYSE:F) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.4% year on year to $43.25 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.66 per share was significantly above analysts’ consensus estimates.
